title: SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK OFFICE SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides trained volunteers who educate, assist, and serve as advocates for people with Medicare. SHIBA volunteers help people with Medicare understand their rights and options for health insurance so that they can make informed decisions. SHIBA volunteers can also provide information on the Qualified Medicare Beneficiary (QMB) program, a Medicaid program that helps people with Medicare pay for their medical care. 5010 E Third Street Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Individuals with Medicare and their family members or caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 842-2770 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 842-2770 Dispatch (800) 584-9712 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Polk and Tillamook Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Going north on Highway 101, turn right on McCormick Loop Road. At the end of the road, take a left on Third Street. One-story tan building on the right side, across from the Forestry Department. Going south on Highway 101, turn left at the stop light after the Tillamook Cheese Factory (Wilson River Loop Road). Turn right at the first stop sign; it will still be named Wilson River Loop Road after the turn. Go past the blinking red light at the Highway 6 intersection and continue up a hill. Turn left at the stop sign onto Third Street. Services: Health Insurance Claims Assistance for Beneficiaries Medicare Information/Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH AND WELLNESS PROGRAMS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TILLAMOOK OFFICE
